# Test apx config migrate

# --- No-op: already at current version ---
exec apx --config=current.yaml config migrate
stdout 'already at version'

# --- Future version: unsupported ---
! exec apx --config=future.yaml config migrate
stderr 'upgrade'

# --- JSON output for no-op ---
exec apx --json --config=current.yaml config migrate
stdout '"migrated": false'

# --- Non-existent config ---
! exec apx --config=nonexistent.yaml config migrate
stderr 'failed to read'

-- current.yaml --
version: 1
org: myorg
repo: myrepo
-- future.yaml --
version: 999
org: myorg
repo: myrepo
